title: dupatya hilairei
intro: Dupatya hilairei, also known as Strychnos hilairei, is a plant species in the Loganiaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Dupatya hilairei include the presence of alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential use in treating fever, rheumatism, and as an antispasmodic, as well as its antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Dupatya hilairei are often made into decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
